title: Climate Action Internship for Women
description: 6-month internship program for young women passionate about environmental conservation and climate action.

title: Australia-ASEAN Women in STEM Fellowship
description: Research fellowship for women scientists from ASEAN countries to collaborate with Australian institutions.

title: Latin America Women Entrepreneurs Grant
description: Startup grants for women entrepreneurs in Latin America focusing on social impact and innovation.

title: European Women in Business Scholarship
description: MBA scholarship for women demonstrating exceptional leadership potential and commitment to advancing women in business.

title: Program Manager - Women's Health Initiative
description: Full-time position managing women's health programs across developing countries.

title: Asia Women Leadership Conference 2026
description: Annual conference bringing together women leaders from across Asia to discuss economic development and leadership.

title: Women in Renewable Energy Grant
description: Research grants for women scientists and entrepreneurs working in renewable energy solutions.

title: UN Women Peace Fellowship
description: Fellowship for women working in peacebuilding and conflict resolution. Includes living stipend and travel.

title: African Women in Tech Internship
description: 12-week paid internship program for African women studying computer science or related fields.

title: Google Women Techmakers Scholarship
description: Scholarship for women pursuing computer science degrees. Includes financial support and Google mentorship.

title: Chevening Scholarship for Women Leaders
description: Full scholarship for one-year Master's degree in any subject at any UK university. Open to women leaders worldwide.

title: UNESCO Fellowship for Women in Science 2026
description: A prestigious fellowship program supporting women researchers in life sciences, physical sciences, mathematics, and engineering.
